author: dankamongmen
text: add pixel component to keller demo

author: dankamongmen
text: The `keller` demo shows off the various blitters; we ought throw `NCBLIT_PIXEL` into the rotation. If unavailable, we should display some indication to that effect (otherwise, setups without pixel support will complete 2s\*4==8s faster than those with, etc.). Otherwise, it ought be centered, ideally stretched, and not visible after its time.

author: dankamongmen
text: ok, i think we've got this working acceptably finally. i now run an `ncplane_erase()` followed by an explicit `DEMO_RENDER()` when doing `NCBLIT_PIXEL`. as a result, the legend damages all cells it touches when printed, and thus shows up properly. it's kind of a gross workaround, but it does work.
